# SEFTEC B2B Trade Hub — AI Crawler Documentation

## Overview
SEFTEC B2B Trade Hub is an open-source B2B ecommerce platform built with React, TypeScript, Supabase, and Vite. It provides a comprehensive marketplace, multi-currency payment processing, trade finance, AI-powered business tools, and real-time notifications.

**Website:** https://www.seftechub.com
**Repository:** https://github.com/thefixer3x/seftec-store

## Core Features

### Marketplace
- Product catalog with search and filtering
- Shopping cart and checkout
- Order management and tracking
- Multi-vendor support
- B2B-specific pricing tiers

### Payment Processing
- **Stripe** — Credit/debit cards, subscriptions, Connect for marketplaces
- **PayPal** — Express checkout, webhook handling
- **SaySwitch** — Bank transfers, bill payments, multi-currency support

### Trade Finance
- Trade finance applications
- Document upload and verification
- Bank statement analysis
- Financial insights dashboard

### Business Tools
- **Inventory Management** — Track stock, suppliers, pricing
- **Customer Management** — CRM with deal tracking
- **Financial Reporting** — Revenue, profit margins, cash flow

### AI Integration (BizGenie)
- AI-powered chatbot for business insights
- Market analysis and trends
- Personalized recommendations
- Business plan generation
- Transaction categorization

### Notifications
- Real-time in-app notifications
- Email integration via Supabase Edge Functions
- Notification preferences and filters

## Technology Stack

| Layer | Technology |
|-------|------------|
| Frontend | React 18, TypeScript, Vite |
| Routing | React Router v6 |
| State | React Context + Hooks |
| Backend | Supabase (PostgreSQL, Edge Functions, Auth, Realtime) |
| Payments | Stripe, PayPal, SaySwitch |
| AI | OpenAI GPT-4 |
| Styling | Tailwind CSS |
| Testing | Vitest |
| i18n | Lingo.dev (8 languages) |

## API Architecture

### Supabase Edge Functions
- `ai-chat` — OpenAI-powered chat
- `bizgenie-router` — Routes to AI modules
- `stripe-webhook` / `stripe-subscription` / `stripe-connect`
- `paypal-payment` / `paypal-webhook`
- `sayswitch-payment` / `sayswitch-transfer` / `sayswitch-bills`
- `create-notification` — Real-time notifications
- `marketplace-products` / `marketplace-cart` / `marketplace-orders`
- `trade-finance-applications` / `trade-finance-documents`

### Authentication
- Supabase Auth with email/password
- OAuth providers (Google, GitHub)
- Protected routes for dashboard, orders, profile
- Role-based access control (RBAC)

## Security

- PCI-DSS compliant payment handling
- Encrypted database connections
- Multi-factor authentication support
- GDPR-compliant data handling
- Feature flag system with audit logging

## Browser Support
- Chrome 90+
- Firefox 88+
- Safari 14+
- Edge 90+

## Accessibility
- WCAG 2.1 AA compliant
- Keyboard navigation
- Screen reader support
- High contrast mode support

## Languages Supported
English, Arabic, Spanish, French, German, Portuguese, Japanese, Chinese

## Getting Started

```bash
# Clone repository
git clone https://github.com/thefixer3x/seftec-store.git
cd seftec-store

# Install dependencies
npm install

# Set up environment variables
cp .env.example .env

# Start development server
npm run dev
```

## Deployment
- **Frontend:** GitHub Pages (SPA mode)
- **Backend:** Supabase Cloud
- **Domain:** www.seftechub.com
